sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64906" key="mandragoriko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μανδρᾰγορ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n64906.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of mandrake</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
